{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316044717955AFC96D6154787AC"}"},"total":4283},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7372786338624340761","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"整部小说来说非常轻快舒适，没有那些恶心的剧情，主角是真无敌，不是打着无敌的标题写着各种奇葩的狗血剧情，不过也有不好的地方，陆雪做天命者那段有点坑，说好三十万年后荒城可以征战，最后却没怎么出手就被陆道生一招结束了，有啥意思，三十万等个寂寞？不过小说整体可以收藏二刷"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716697427,"group_id":"7190726371935521829","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2GafqxxcswWr/1yGVEEdw/DN4xrlwzcCefe77rv4Tm2","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1842426704574296","user_name":"火希69"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1842426704574296","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7190726371935521829","book_info":{"abstract":"【无敌+创建势力+系统+单女主】
陆道生穿越到修炼世界，摸爬滚打数年，终于爬到了城主的位子，本以为这辈子就这样了。
直到有一天，系统降临了。
这，这系统怎么感觉有点不一样。
“系统，这商店里的东西都是免费的吗？”
“免费的。”
“系统，我不需要修炼的吗？”
“不需要。”
“系统，我想要老婆。”
“我帮你找。”
